original: Le petit docteur s'avance et se racle la gorge, puis dit : "Je suis le Docteur Cydonia, assistant personnel du seigneur de guerre."

Dardan lets out a sigh.

"I already know about her little crusade. I'd thank you not to mention her- unless she's finally decided to do the right thing and return to the Gens?"

He barely waits before he says "Didn't think so."

option_line: dardanKato_askImoinuOptA:"My impression was that she wishes to stay where she is."
original: My impression was that she wishes to stay where she is.

option_line: dardanKato_askImoinuOptB:"I gave her material support for the ARC. She seems capable of looking after herself."
original: I gave her material support for the ARC. She seems capable of looking after herself.

He gives you a wretched look. "Tell me you didn't."

"No," he holds up a hand. "Don't tell me at all. I don't want to know. Drop it. We're not talking about this."
"By the bloody stars, please and thank-you," he mutters under his breath,

option_line: yaribay_followup1:"Des nouvelles de notre ami commun ?"
original: Des nouvelles de notre ami commun ?
